title: EDPB breach notification - aggregate transparency model
description: Aggregate, anonymised statistics of breach notifications derived from the EDPB template taxonomy (California-model transparency, proposal 14). Counts only, by category, over a reporting period. NEVER single-notification level. Anonymisation: no controller identity, no free-text, no dates finer than the period, small-cell suppression (k-anonymity).

k_anonymity_threshold.description: Cells with a count below this are suppressed (reported under 'suppressed').

dimensions.description: Each dimension maps a template field to a {category: count} map. Suppressed small cells are summed into '__suppressed__'.

art34_communicated.description: EDPB field 97 (communicated to data subjects: yes/no)
